nodes.context: Street gang based in New Cross, Lewisham and Deptford, South London, active since 1980s.
Rival street gang based in Peckham, South London.
Splinter group formed by younger members of Ghetto Boys, formerly Younger Ghetto Boys.
Street gang associated with Shower, collectively calling themselves Shower Syndicate.
Jamaican gang alleged to have links with Ghetto Boys.
Offshoot group from Ghetto Boys that gained prominence in UK drill scene in mid-2010s.
Splinter group from Ghetto Boys formed by members in Catford.
Gang that superseded the weakened Ghetto Boys in mid-2000s in Lewisham.
Grove Park based gang in conflict with 814.
Ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
Ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
Rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
Rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang had a notably violent conflict with the Peckham Boys during the 2000s
edges.context: Ghetto Boys and Peckham Boys were in a violent conflict during the 2000s.

edges.evidence_quote: By 2007/8, after decades of conflict, the Peckham Boys and Ghetto Boys had agreed to a ceasefire and alliance.
edges.context: The two gangs agreed to a ceasefire and alliance by 2007/8.

edges.evidence_quote: Younger members of the gang formed "Shower"
edges.context: Shower was formed by younger members of Ghetto Boys as a splinter group.

edges.evidence_quote: later became associated with the Tottenham Mandem , collectively calling themselves "Shower Syndicate"
edges.context: Shower became associated with Tottenham Mandem, forming Shower Syndicate.

edges.evidence_quote: It is alleged the group had links with the Jamaican gang Shower Posse
edges.context: Ghetto Boys allegedly had links with Shower Posse.

edges.evidence_quote: an offshoot group from the Ghetto Boys, known as 814
edges.context: 814 is an offshoot group from Ghetto Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: Ghetto Boys members in Catford split off from the gang to form their own gang called the Catford Wildcatz
edges.context: Catford Wildcatz is a splinter group from Ghetto Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: Black Mafia (BM) was one of the gangs that superseded the now weakened and fragmented Ghetto Boys
edges.context: Black Mafia superseded the weakened Ghetto Boys.

edges.evidence_quote: The group was reported to be in conflict with Splash Gang (SG)
edges.context: 814 was in conflict with Splash Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)
edges.context: Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)
edges.context: Tottenham Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Brockley Mandem, Tottenham Mandem , Young Brockley Mandem (YBM)
edges.context: Young Brockley Mandem is an ally of Ghetto Boys per infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Catford Wildcats (Anti Shower), Peckham Boys , Woolwich Boys , Cherry Boys
edges.context: Catford Wildcatz is a rival of Ghetto Boys per infobox.
